sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; function Programs() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('btech'); const categories = [ { id: 'btech', label: 'B.Tech', color: 'bg-blue-600', programs: [ 'Information & Communication Technology (ICT)', 'Civil Engineering', 'Automobile Engineering', 'Mechanical Engineering', 'Metallurgical Engineering', 'Electrical Engineering', 'Electronics & Communication Engineering', 'Computer Engineering', 'Cyber Security', 'Information Technology', 'Computer Science Engineering', 'Aircraft Maintenance Engineering', 'Aeronautical Engineering', 'Aerospace Engineering', 'Defence Aerospace Engineering' ] }, { id: 'btech-dtd', label: 'B.Tech (D to D)', color: 'bg-amber-800', programs: [ 'Information & Communication Technology (ICT)', 'Civil Engineering', 'Automobile Engineering', 'Mechanical Engineering', 'Metallurgical Engineering', 'Electrical Engineering', 'Electronics & Communication Engineering', 'Computer Engineering', 'Cyber Security', 'Information Technology', 'Computer Science Engineering' ] }, { id: 'diploma', label: 'Diploma', color: 'bg-orange-500', programs: [ 'Information & Communication Technology (ICT)', 'Civil Engineering', 'Automobile Engineering', 'Mechanical Engineering', 'Computer Engineering', 'Electrical Engineering', 'Electronics & Communication Engineering' ] }, { id: 'mtech', label: 'M.Tech', color: 'bg-red-700', programs: [ 'CAD / CAM (Mechanical Engr.)', 'Construction Project Management (Civil Engg.)', 'Digital Communication (EC Engg.)', 'Electrical Power System', 'Industrial Metallurgy', 'Structural Engineering (Civil Engg.)', 'Data Science (Computer)', 'Cyber Security' ] }, { id: 'bdes', label: 'B.Des', color: 'bg-yellow-500', programs: [ 'Product Design', 'Interior Design', 'Fashion Design', 'Communication Design - (Graphic Design)' ] }, { id: 'mdes', label: 'M.Des', color: 'bg-teal-600', programs: [ 'Fashion Design', 'Interior Design', 'UI-UX Design' ] }, { id: 'bsc', label: 'B.Sc', color: 'bg-blue-500', programs: [ 'Data Science', 'Computer Application (CA) & (Information Technology (IT)', 'Clinical Research and Health Care Management (Hons)', 'Mathematics (Hons)', 'Physics (Hons)', 'Chemistry (Hons)', 'Cyber Security (Hons)', 'Microbiology (Hons)', 'Computer Science (AI & ML)' ] }, { id: 'msc', label: 'M.Sc', color: 'bg-red-600', programs: [ 'Information Technology (IT)', 'Clinical Research', 'Mathematics', 'Physics', 'Chemistry', 'Cyber Security', 'Microbiology' ] }, { id: 'mba-avia', label: 'MBA/BBA', color: 'bg-purple-600', programs: [ 'Aviation Management', 'BBA', 'Marketing', 'Finance', 'Human Resource' ] }, { id: 'bca', label: 'BCA', color: 'bg-purple-700', programs: ['BCA'] }, { id: 'mca', label: 'MCA', color: 'bg-red-800', programs: ['MCA'] }, { id: 'bcom', label: 'B.Com', color: 'bg-cyan-600', programs: ['Bachelor of Commerce (Hons)'] }, { id: 'barch', label: 'B.Arch', color: 'bg-orange-600', programs: ['Bachelor of Architecture'] }, { id: 'ba', label: 'B.A.', color: 'bg-teal-700', programs: ['English (Hons)'] }, { id: 'bpharm', label: 'B. Pharm', color: 'bg-green-700', programs: [ 'Bachelor of Pharmacy', 'D TO D Pharmacy', 'M.Pharm' ] }, { id: 'research', label: 'Research', color: 'bg-slate-800', programs: [ 'Ph.D. Management', 'Ph.D. Science', 'Ph.D. English', 'Ph.D. Computer Applications', 'Ph.D. Commerce', 'Ph.D. Humanities', 'Ph.D. Engineering' ] } ]; const currentCategory = categories.find(c => c.id === activeTab); return (
{/* Admissions Header */}

Academic Programs

Admissions Open 2026-27

{/* Horizontal Folder Tabs */}
{categories.map((cat) => ( ))}
{/* Folder Content Section */}

{prog}
))}
)}
{/* Footer Quote */}

); } export default Programs;
